summary: Plan-mode inventory classification for 10 open PR candidates. No shared canonical was selected. Nine PRs are kept independently for their own maintainer/proof/review paths; #90061 is planned as superseded by the already-merged hydrated PR #89350.

actions.reason: Independent Google Chat fix candidate with passing proof but maintainer-review merge gate; no closeout or shared canonical decision is warranted in this inventory shard.
Draft maintainer-owned provider-runtime hardening candidate with unresolved author/review path; keep it as an independent PR rather than closing or merging.
Useful contributor PR with active review context and unresolved review-bot comments; preserve contributor credit and keep independently for maintainer review.
Draft capability-provider candidate with a distinct plugin surface and unresolved change requests; keep independently.
Distinct gateway method-descriptor candidate with maintainer-review gate; keep independently in this inventory shard.
Distinct tool metadata isolation PR with maintainer-review gate; keep independently.
Same root cause and same file surface as already-merged hydrated PR #89350; #90061 is a draft maintainer-owned duplicate/superseded branch with no unique hydrated coverage shown.
Distinct gateway session inference PR; closed linked issue is context only, and the open draft branch should stay independent.
Distinct plugin registration resilience candidate with maintainer-review gate; keep independently.
Potentially useful contributor PR but proof is failing and session-state risk is high; keep independently for author/maintainer follow-up, with no close or merge recommendation.
